channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Quantum Mechanics Can Be Formulated Without Imaginary Numbers, Study Suggests
item.description: A groundbreaking study by physicists at Heinrich-Heine University Düsseldorf and other institutions challenges a long-standing assumption in quantum mechanics. Researchers found that complex numbers, ...

item.title: Melbourne's Southeast becomes state's new caravan capital
item.description: The article discusses how Melbourne's Southeast region has been recognized as the new caravan capital of the state. It highlights the growth in caravan manufacturing and tourism, noting increased inve...

item.title: Judge Criticizes Trump's IRS Lawsuit as Improper and Recommends Attorney Disciplinary Action
item.description: U.S. District Judge Kathleen Williams issued a scathing ruling against President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service (IRS), calling it an 'improper purpose' and recommending sa...

item.title: Fatal shooting at Toronto's Salsa on St. Clair festival prompts police update and community response
item.description: Toronto police are holding a news conference today to provide an update on the deadly shooting at the Salsa on St. Clair festival, where two people died and multiple others were injured. The incident ...

item.title: Marcos Jr. boosts Northern Mindanao connectivity with new Camiguin port
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. officially launched the P86.9-million Benoni port light craft landing station in Mahinog, Camiguin, aimed at enhancing inter-island connectivity between Northern Mindana...

item.title: Sen. Marcoleta Ordered for Medical Exam Amid Plunder Case
item.description: The Sandiganbayan, an anti-graft court, has directed the Criminal Investigation and Detection Group (CIDG) and officers of the PNP General Hospital to bring Senator Rodante Marcoleta to Philippine Gen...

item.title: Tanzania's Strategy to Enhance Neuro-Oncology Care Through Five Key Priorities
item.description: Tanzania has launched a comprehensive strategy to improve neuro-oncology services amid rising cases of brain and spinal cord cancers. The five-point plan focuses on expanding medical training for spec...

item.title: The Contradiction of Conservation and Fossil Fuel Exploitation in Singapore
item.description: The article highlights the stark contrast between conservation efforts and fossil fuel exploitation in Singapore. The Singapore Oceanarium, an engineering marvel housing 100,000 creatures, including m...

item.title: Camps Bay FC Under-16 Girls Make Strides at Gothia Youth Cup in Gothenburg
item.description: Thirteen-year-old Misha Abader, the youngest player on the Camps Bay FC under-16 girls squad, is experiencing her first international sports journey at the 2026 Gothia Youth Cup in Gothenburg, Sweden....

item.title: Atiku Clarifies Court Ruling on ADC Primaries, Calls for Unity
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar has urged party members and Nigerians to stay calm after a court ruling that did not invalidate the ADC's primary elections. In a statement by his Senior Special A...

item.title: Darline Graham Nordone, sister of late Senator Lindsey Graham, considered for Senate replacement
item.description: Darline Graham Nordone, the younger sister of the late U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, is being considered as a potential temporary replacement for his Senate seat in South Carolina. Graham, who passed a...

item.title: Andy Burnham confirmed as new Labour leader with 349 MPs' backing
item.description: Andy Burnham has secured the Labour leadership with the support of 349 MPs, effectively ending the leadership race. After receiving additional nominations, Burnham now has the backing of 349 MPs, maki...

item.title: Canadians Adjusting Spending Habits Amid Rising Financial Pressures
item.description: A new report by MNP Ltd., based on Ipsos polling, reveals that Canadians are increasingly burdened by financial pressures that force them to cut back on non-essential expenses before receiving their p...

item.title: Chadema Geita chairperson faces court appearance after arrest
item.description: Neema Chozaire, the chairperson of Chadema Geita constituency, is set to appear in court on Tuesday following her arrest on June 29, 2026. She was taken into police custody after being arrested while ...

item.title: Tom Cruise's 'Digger' Trailer: Oil Baron's Mission to Save the World in Alejandro G. Inarritu's Comedy
item.description: The article discusses the release of the 'Digger' movie trailer, starring Tom Cruise as an oil baron attempting to save the world. Directed by Alejandro G. Inarritu, the film features a stellar cast i...

item.title: CBCP Launches Mental Health Initiatives with Counseling and Apologies
item.description: The Catholic Bishops' Conference of the Philippines (CBCP) has issued a pastoral letter addressing mental health awareness, emphasizing the importance of compassion, understanding, and professional ca...

item.title: Four Killed in Mpumalanga Car Shooting as Suspects Fire Over 40 Shots
item.description: A traumatic incident unfolded in Mkhuhlu, Bushbuckridge, Mpumalanga, where four people were gunned down while sitting inside a car after gunmen fired over 40 shots. Phumla Mona, an 18-year-old brother...

item.title: Senate investigates N34tn import duty waivers and threatens sanctions for non-compliant MDAs
item.description: The Senate Committee on Finance has launched an investigation into the Federal Government's issuance of Import Duty Exemption Certificates (IDEC) worth N34 trillion between 2020 and 2025, warning that...

item.title: Debt Dispute Escalates to Murder in Kenya
item.description: A Kenyan court has shifted a civil debt case involving 18,000 shillings into a murder charge after the dispute turned deadly. The original case centered on an outstanding debt of approximately $140, w...

item.title: Toronto Police Identify Victims in Salsa on St. Clair Shooting
item.description: Toronto police have identified the victims of a deadly shooting that occurred during the Salsa on St. Clair festival. The incident, which left two individuals dead, has sparked significant concern abo...
